quote: You may be disappointed if you fail, but you are doomed if you don't try. – Beverly Sills
fact: The value of Pi will be officially "rounded down" to 3.14 from 3.14159265359 on December 31, 1999.
joke: A man was caught stealing in a supermarket today while balanced on the shoulders of a couple of vampires. He was charged with shoplifting on two counts.
